product: 山海经原典地图研究台
updater: Signed multi-source updater + GitHub data publishing
data_publish: GitHub submissions/pending via local authenticated Git
hierarchy_fix: v0.5.3 region overview and local bounds
relation_line_fix: v0.5.4 stable pan, viewport clipping, offscreen targets and relation cache
relation_network: v0.6.0 compact/full modes, directional bundling, offscreen aggregation and hover labels
ux_bundle: v0.6.0 object focus, research/display view, image manager and delete impact preview
relation_interaction: v0.6.1 click-to-explain cards, wider hit areas, edge routing and persistent relation focus
toolbar_ux: v0.6.1 responsive groups, More menu, delayed help tips and collapsible legend
visual_theme: v0.7.1 玉简山海：地块选择、对象聚焦与区域聚焦统一退出修正
environment_layer: v0.7.1 static shanshui overview with endless mist transition; 50% tile-card visibility threshold
river_guidance: all 79 existing water paths use muted ink-water rendering in overview and gradually return to functional lines while zooming in
performance: one reusable overview buffer canvas; cached overview image; no runtime mountain motif generation; CSS tile-card fade
asset_bundle: v0.7.1 existing UI and map environment assets; no data changes
brush_trace_fix: upper overlay canvas, immediate pointer-move redraw, resize safety and visible red trace
overview_geometry_fix: single/double sparse groups show labels only; disconnected groups split; connected 100-li cells trace independent union boundaries
focus_logic: right click or Esc clears range/region focus, selected tile/object, object-focus dimming and stale classes while preserving camera position
